CustomField.description: Forces Customizable Rollups to use Skew Mode for this Contact's hard credit and soft credit calculations. Enable this for Contacts with an unusually large number of related Opportunities to avoid batch processing limits.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box to force rollup calculations for this Contact to use Skew Mode, which handles large numbers of related Opportunities.
CustomField.label: Customizable Rollups: Force Skew Mode
